mapper.select:
{ CALL ${schema}..USP_SO_ALLUPDATE_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soTypeList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mallNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refSoList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srchAddr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{instCtgrList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL ${schema}..USP_SO_ALLUPDATE_UPDT ( #{tblSoMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updtGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCnfmDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{giLiftDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyRqstMsg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instMemo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyStatCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCmplDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
